mapper.sql: select line_id, factory_id, recpt_id, item_id, item_code, item_name, specification, unit_of_measure, unit_name, unit2, unit2_name, conversion_rate, quantity_recpt, quantity_recpt2, batch_id, batch_code, warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, location_id, area_id, produce_date, expire_date, lot_number, notice_line_id, pur_order_line_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from qxx_wm_item_recpt_line
mapper.insert:
insert into qxx_wm_item_recpt_line recpt_id, item_id, item_code, item_name, specification, unit_of_measure, unit_name, unit2, unit2_name, conversion_rate, quantity_recpt, quantity_recpt2, batch_id, batch_code, warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, location_id, area_id, produce_date, expire_date, lot_number, notice_line_id, pur_order_line_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{recptId}, #{itemId}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{specification}, #{unitOfMeasure}, #{unitName}, #{unit2}, #{unit2Name}, #{conversionRate}, #{quantityRecpt}, #{quantityRecpt2}, #{batchId}, #{batchCode}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{locationId}, #{areaId}, #{produceDate}, #{expireDate}, #{lotNumber}, #{noticeLineId}, #{purOrderLineId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update:
update qxx_wm_item_recpt_line recpt_id = #{recptId}, item_id = #{itemId}, item_code = #{itemCode}, item_name = #{itemName}, specification = #{specification}, unit_of_measure = #{unitOfMeasure}, unit_name = #{unitName}, unit2 = #{unit2}, unit2_name = #{unit2Name}, conversion_rate = #{conversionRate}, quantity_recpt = #{quantityRecpt}, quantity_recpt2 = #{quantityRecpt2}, batch_id = #{batchId}, batch_code = #{batchCode}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, location_id = #{locationId}, area_id = #{areaId}, produce_date = #{produceDate}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, lot_number = #{lotNumber}, notice_line_id = #{noticeLineId}, pur_order_line_id = #{purOrderLineId}, remark = #{remark}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
where line_id = #{lineId}
mapper.select: SELECT agg.item_id AS itemId, agg.item_code AS itemCode, agg.item_name AS itemName, agg.specification AS specification, agg.unit_of_measure AS unitOfMeasure, agg.unit_name AS unitName, agg.warehouse_id AS warehouseId, agg.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode, agg.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, agg.batch_id AS batchId, agg.batch_code AS batchCode, agg.expire_date AS expireDate, agg.recpt_id AS recptId, agg.recpt_code AS recptCode, agg.pur_order_line_id AS purOrderLineId, agg.total_quantity AS quantityRecptTotal, (COALESCE(rt.returned_qty, 0) + COALESCE(dr.draft_qty, 0)) AS quantityReturned, (agg.total_quantity - COALESCE(rt.returned_qty, 0) - COALESCE(dr.draft_qty, 0)) AS quantityReturnable FROM ( -- 严格按 (item, warehouse, batch) 聚合入库量,跨多张入库单合并; -- 同批次可能来自多张入库单: recpt_code 用 GROUP_CONCAT 合并展示来源, -- recpt_id/pur_order_line_id/expire_date 用聚合函数取(V49 保证同 PO 同物料唯一) SELECT irl.item_id, MAX(irl.item_code) AS item_code, MAX(irl.item_name) AS item_name, MAX(irl.specification) AS specification, MAX(irl.unit_of_measure) AS unit_of_measure, MAX(irl.unit_name) AS unit_name, irl.warehouse_id, MAX(irl.warehouse_code) AS warehouse_code, MAX(irl.warehouse_name) AS warehouse_name, irl.batch_id, MAX(irl.batch_code) AS batch_code, MAX(irl.expire_date) AS expire_date, MAX(ir.recpt_id) AS recpt_id, -- 仅展示用:GROUP_CONCAT 受 group_concat_max_len(默认1024)限制可能截断,不做业务判断; -- 同批次多值时 expire_date/pur_order_line_id 取 MAX(同批次理论一致) GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ir.recpt_code ORDER BY ir.recpt_code SEPARATOR ',') AS recpt_code, MAX(irl.pur_order_line_id) AS pur_order_line_id, SUM(irl.quantity_recpt) AS total_quantity FROM qxx_wm_item_recpt_line irl JOIN qxx_wm_item_recpt ir ON ir.recpt_id = irl.recpt_id WHERE ir.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId} AND ir.status = 'POSTED' AND irl.quantity_recpt > 0 GROUP BY irl.item_id, irl.warehouse_id, irl.batch_id ) agg LEFT JOIN ( -- 已确认退货量: wm_transaction(ITEM_RTV) 按 (item, warehouse, batch) 反查 -- (覆盖 CONFIRMED + POSTED 退货单,这两类在 confirm 时已写事务) SELECT t.item_id, t.warehouse_id, COALESCE(t.batch_id, 0) AS batch_key, SUM(ABS(t.quantity)) AS returned_qty FROM qxx_wm_transaction t WHERE t.transaction_type = 'ITEM_RTV' GROUP BY t.item_id, t.warehouse_id, COALESCE(t.batch_id, 0) ) rt ON rt.item_id = agg.item_id AND rt.warehouse_id = agg.warehouse_id AND rt.batch_key = COALESCE(agg.batch_id, 0) LEFT JOIN ( -- 草稿退货单占用量: DRAFT 状态退货单未扣库存(不在 transaction 里), -- 但业务上已声明要退,必须占用可退量防止重复生成超退 SELECT rtl.item_id, rtl.warehouse_id, COALESCE(rtl.batch_id, 0) AS batch_key, SUM(rtl.quantity_rt) AS draft_qty FROM qxx_wm_rt_vendor_line rtl JOIN qxx_wm_rt_vendor rth ON rth.rt_id = rtl.rt_id WHERE rth.status = 'DRAFT' AND rth.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId} GROUP BY rtl.item_id, rtl.warehouse_id, COALESCE(rtl.batch_id, 0) ) dr ON dr.item_id = agg.item_id AND dr.warehouse_id = agg.warehouse_id AND dr.batch_key = COALESCE(agg.batch_id, 0) WHERE (agg.total_quantity - COALESCE(rt.returned_qty, 0) - COALESCE(dr.draft_qty, 0)) > 0 ORDER BY agg.item_code
mapper.delete:
delete from qxx_wm_item_recpt_line where line_id in
#{lineId}
